description_long: This shotgun features a robust, industrial design with a predominantly black and metallic body accented by orange highlights and copper-colored ribbed elements along the barrel. The main body is angular and blocky, with a prominent rectangular housing and a series of orange vent-like details on the side. The barrel is elongated and reinforced, with visible ribbing and a squared-off muzzle. A set of red cables or wires is attached to the underside, adding a mechanical, high-tech appearance. The grip area is compact and integrated into the main body, with a visible trigger guard and ergonomic shaping. The overall aesthetic suggests a futuristic or sci-fi weapon, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A futuristic, industrial shotgun with a black and metallic body, orange highlights, ribbed barrel, and red cables, featuring a compact grip and angular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the squared-off muzzle, ribbed barrel, and a glimpse of the orange highlights.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the barrel, orange vent details, and the attached red cables beneath the main body.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the compact grip, trigger guard, and the back of the main housing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the angular body, ribbed barrel, and the red cables more prominently.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with visible ribbing and reinforced muzzle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rectangular trigger guard with a straight profile and no visible finger grooves
